fato_historico: 2024: A Saurya Airlines Bombardier CRJ200 crashes during takeoff from Tribhuvan International Airport in Kathmandu, Nepal killing 18.
energia_do_dia: The stars suggest that your spirit may feel exceptionally bold today, Aries. As you navigate your path, consider the fragility of moments and cherish the breath of life. It is a good time to focus on your resilience, letting your inner fire guide you through challenges while keeping your heart open to the delicate beauty of the present.
frase_do_dia: Every sunrise is a gift, cherish your journey and keep soaring forward.
significado_numero: Represents the strength found in overcoming obstacles and finding new beginnings.
conselho: Take a deep breath and appreciate the small wonders around you today.
